summary: Frontend-only smoke test for G.O.A.T. site across Home, Menu, About routes covering navbar, hero CTAs, menu tabs/sub-tabs, About stats/CTAs, mobile hamburger, and reserve href validation. All 13 verified flows passed with zero console errors.
passed: Sticky navbar visible with logo and reserve CTA
Hero title text = 'Where Every Evening Ascends'
Hero CTA Explore Menu navigates to /menu
Hero CTA Our Story navigates to /about
Menu Food tab default; veg sub-tab default shows 3 categories (Breads, Veg Combos, Veg Signature Soup Combos)
Non-Veg sub-tab swaps to 3 non-veg categories
Beverages tab shows placeholder with Reserve Your Table CTA
All Reserve CTAs (navbar, menu beverages, about whatsapp) href starts with https://wa.me/919144408801
About title 'Born to Be the Greatest' present; stats render 4.5 / 700+ / One-of-a-Kind
About has 3 value cards and accessibility pills
About Call Now href = tel:+919144408801; Get Directions opens google.com/maps
Mobile (375x800) hamburger opens drawer, mobile nav link visible, toggle closes
No console errors or page errors during navigation
